description: rowspan cells (2- and 3-row) with vertical-align:middle, later rows shifting into freed columns, mixed with a colspan footer.
visual_assertions: 'Produce' spans three body rows as one tall cell, vertically centered, with a single blue background box and border.
'fresh daily' spans the first two body rows; 'seasonal' appears in the Note column of the third row once that span ends.
'Dairy' spans two rows, vertically centered; 'Cheese' and 'aged' sit beside it in the freed columns.
The final row's 'Grand total' spans two columns (colspan) alongside the rowspan cells above.
